title: FastCraft
description:
This is a simple mod pack that makes your game run with so many more frames you might not even know what to do with them all.

(i wanna update and add more versions but idk how lol)
body:
**WANT SOME MORE FRAMES?!?!?!?**

You have come to the right place. Even your potato computer (ran this on integrated, and it multiplied my fps like 8x) can run Minecraft with this amazingly optimized Minecraft mod pack, properly named **FastCraft.**

Increase your FPS and enjoy some QoL mods like do a Barrel Roll, which places you in Microsoft Flight Simulator whenever you have an elytra on, there is also a map so you know where you are going, support for gorgeous shaders, and so much more!

Download now! You won't regret it.
